/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/link.d  -o /home/jesus/.emacs.d/elpa/vterm-20260626.1906/vterm-module.so "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/vterm-module.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/utf8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/elisp.c.o"  libvterm-prefix/src/libvterm/.libs/libvterm.a -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/X11R6/lib:/usr/local/lib
